executionArgs.additionalInstruction: FINAL CONSOLIDATED RUN — all 46 tests. Frontend: http://localhost:5174, Backend: http://localhost:3001. No auth. Key facts: (1) RevealModal confirm button has data-testid='enter-void-btn' — always use [data-testid='enter-void-btn'] to click it. Contact field is optional so click through immediately. (2) Empty alias: pressing Enter on empty alias input shows 'alias cannot be empty.' error via onKeyDown handler. (3) Special chars show validation error without silent stripping. (4) /waiting accessible directly without sessionStorage. Leave Lobby button has data-testid='leave-lobby-btn'. (5) Result demo: /result/any?demo=connected shows 'you matched.'; /result/any?demo=vanished shows 'gone.'. (6) Session demo: /session/demo?demo=session — renders prompt card (data-testid='prompt-card'), round bar (data-testid='round-bar'), round label 'round 3 of 3' (data-testid='round-label'), turn counter '3 / 6 messages' (data-testid='turn-counter'), turn indicator (data-testid='turn-indicator'), message bubbles (data-testid='message-bubble-right' and 'message-bubble-left'). (7) API tests: use fetch() via page.evaluate() to http://localhost:3001/health, /api/stats, /api/prompts. Tests needing two real sockets should be marked BLOCKED.
